text: Now let me execute the incident commander sweep in one comprehensive program:

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def sentry-issues (sentry__list_issues {:status "unresolved"}))
(def worst-issue (apply max-key :users_affected sentry-issues))
(def service (:project worst-issue))
(def sentry-id (:id worst-issue))
(def sentry-title (:title worst-issue))
(def triggered-incidents (pagerduty__list_incidents {:status "triggered" :service service}))
(def incident-ids (map :id triggered-incidents))…(+514)
